Our Story

Behind Velounar

Velounar is a proudly Australian based brand, shipping straight from our warehouse in Queensland. We are a small team of hardworking girls who pour so much love into everything we do.

The support and love we receive from our customers genuinely means the world to us 🌸 Every order, every kind message — we see it all and we are so grateful. Thank you for being part of our journey.

🇦🇺 Australian Based Woman Owned Cruelty Free Made with love 🌸

Faulty or Damaged Items

If your item arrives damaged or faulty, please contact us at velounarbeauty@gmail.com within 7 days with your order number and a photo. We will offer a full refund or replacement and cover return shipping.

Wrong Item Received

If we sent you the wrong item, contact us within 7 days and we will send the correct item and cover all return shipping costs.

Change of Mind

Due to hygiene reasons we cannot accept returns on opened lash or nail products. Unopened items in original packaging may be exchanged within 7 days — customer covers return shipping.

Wrong Colour or Style Ordered

Contact us as soon as possible. If not yet dispatched we will amend your order. Once dispatched, exchanges are available on unopened items — customer pays return shipping.

🇦🇺 Our policy complies with Australian Consumer Law. You are always entitled to a remedy for major faults.
